name: pin_tier3_spray_one_mention_tags_all_children
description: RE-RECORDED 2026-06-10 as the regression-gate proof of the Tier 3 full child fan-out. The 2026-06-07 'spray fix' emitted ONE tag on the primary CCI per matched Control, on the assumption the LLM bundler is per-Control so siblings would see the artifact via the bundle. That batched bundler was never shipped — build_tagged_evidence_with_payload queries WHERE objective_id == <one CCI> and the assess loop runs per-CCI, so primary-CCI-only tagging STARVED every sibling CCI (empty bundle -> rule_no_evidence -> confident Non-Compliant). REVERTED 2026-06-10: one body mention of 'AC-2' now fans out to EVERY child Objective of ac-2 (CCI-000015 / CCI-000016 / CCI-000017), each at confidence 0.5 and the shared control-level cosine relevance band [0.35, 0.75]. ac-3's CCI-000213 must NOT receive a tag — the bounded-by-control invariant (no family-keyword broadcast) still holds. A regression that re-introduces primary-CCI-only selection collapses this from 3 tags to 1 and trips this case loudly.

evidence.text: This policy implements AC-2 account management requirements.
